problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating may resolve What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
